full_text:
Xue Ying (Daoyan) 薛瑩 (道言)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Ying (薛瑩), styledDaoyan (道言). One of the collaborative authors behind theWu shu(Wu History). Xue Ying was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Xue Ying lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
